overview: Reefling is a Normal-class Beast monster found in Ship Graveyard. 1 grades: Common. Base stats (Common): 20 HP, 12 physical damage, 150 move speed, ActionSpeed 0. ImpactResistance 1, MaxImpactEndurance 1. 2 attacks, 0 combo chains. Highest damage: Range Attack at 170% ratio (204 base damage). Sight range 800.

phases.name: Melee Combat
phases.description: 2 melee attacks. Melee Attack (150%), Range Attack (170%).

combo_flow.description: This monster does not use combo chains. Each attack is selected independently by the AI.

strategies.title: Elemental Weakness: Fire
strategies.description: Significant elemental weaknesses: Fire (-2000). Negative reduction values mean incoming damage of that type is amplified.

strategies.title: Detection Range: 800 units
strategies.description: Sight radius 800 units, loses target at 1800 units, 180° vision angle.

ai_perception.damage_description: Reacts to damage from any direction.
ai_perception.sight_description: Detects targets within 800 units. Loses target at 1800 units.
